mapper.insert: INSERT INTO position_view_record (position_id, student_id, view_time) VALUES (#{positionId}, #{studentId}, #{viewTime})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM position_view_record WHERE position_id = #{positionId} AND student_id = #{studentId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM position_view_record WHERE position_id = #{positionId} AND student_id = #{studentId}
